verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 33.48m (33,483,000) is the Q1 2026 annualized subscription value — confirmed by vantage-customer-2026q1 (B13: 33483000) and the vantage-update-2026q1 prose — and appears only as the 'Prior' column in the Q2 2026 sheet. The current Q2 2026 authoritative value is 34,778,000 (EUR 34.78m), per vantage-customer-2026q2 (B13: 34778000) and vantage-update-2026q2. The claim asserts last quarter's value as if it were the current-quarter figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Update the master document to use the Q2 2026 actual of EUR 34.78 million (34,778,000) rather than the carried-forward Q1 2026 prior value of EUR 33.48 million.

final_text:
The dossier and vault confirm a clear stale-figure pattern. The claim's EUR 33.48m is the Q1 2026 value (33,483,000), not the Q2 2026 value — the current Q2 2026 authoritative figure is 34,778,000 (EUR 34.78m).
